name: cornerstone_hr_compliance_base_features_v1
description: Cornerstone Learn HR compliance base features (silver layer) derived from training assignments/registrations/transcripts for compliance reporting and dashboards. Row-level only; aggregations belong in gold.

properties.notes: Non-aggregate features only. Use these to compute counts/rates by OU/department/course/time in gold cubes.

metrics.question: How many registrations are at risk of not completing training on time?
metrics.description: Total number of registered users who are at risk for not completing training on time
related_questions: What is the total number of registrations at risk?
How many learning object registrations are at risk?
Count of registrations at risk for on-time completion

metrics.question: How many employees are at risk of not completing training on time?
metrics.description: Total number of individual employees who are at risk for not completing training on time
related_questions: What is the total number of employees at risk?
How many users are at risk?
Count of employees at risk for on-time completion

metrics.question: What are the primary risk factors causing training completion risk?
metrics.description: Distribution of the top primary risk factors for all trainings that are at risk
related_questions: What factors are causing compliance risk?
What are the main reasons for training completion risk?
Which risk factors are driving non-compliance?
What risk factors impact on-time completion?

metrics.question: How many learning objects are at risk by department?
metrics.description: Number of learning objects at risk within each Department OU
related_questions: Which departments have the most learning objects at risk?
What is the distribution of at-risk learning objects by department?
How many courses are at risk per department?

metrics.question: How many employees are at risk by department?
metrics.description: Number of employees at risk within each Department OU
related_questions: Which departments have the most employees at risk?
What is the distribution of at-risk employees by department?
How many users are at risk per department?

metrics.question: How many learning objects are at risk for a specific employee?
metrics.description: Number of learning objects at risk for a specific employee
related_questions: How many courses is an employee at risk for?
What is the count of at-risk learning objects per employee?
How many trainings are at risk for this employee?

metrics.question: How many users are at risk for a specific learning object?
metrics.description: Number of users at risk for a specific learning object
related_questions: How many employees are at risk for this course?
What is the count of at-risk users per learning object?
How many users are at risk for this training?

metrics.question: What is the historic compliance rate?
metrics.description: Historic compliance rate over a specified time period (typically 1 year, divided quarterly)
related_questions: What is the historical compliance rate?
What was the compliance rate in the past?
What is the trend of compliance rates over time?
How has compliance rate changed historically?

metrics.question: What is the forecasted compliance rate?
metrics.description: Forecasted compliance rate looking ahead, divided quarterly, based on current course registrations due in the future
related_questions: What is the predicted compliance rate?
What will the compliance rate be in the future?
What is the projected compliance rate?
How is compliance rate expected to change?

metrics.question: What is the compliance rate by organizational unit?
metrics.description: Compliance rate for each organizational unit, color-coded from low (red) to high (green)
related_questions: Which organizational units have the highest compliance rates?
What is the compliance rate for each department?
How does compliance rate vary by organizational unit?
Which departments are most compliant?

metrics.question: How many courses are overdue for completion by department?
metrics.description: Number of courses that are overdue for completion within each department
related_questions: How many overdue courses does each department have?
What is the count of overdue trainings by department?
Which departments have the most overdue courses?

metrics.question: What predictive factors contribute to on-time course completion?
metrics.description: Factors that are predictive to the organization's on-time course completion
related_questions: What factors predict training completion?
Which factors influence on-time completion?
What are the key predictors of compliance?
What factors affect whether employees complete training on time?

metrics.question: What is the training completion rate?
metrics.description: Percentage of employees who completed training within the deadline
related_questions: What percentage of employees completed training on time?
What is the completion rate for training?
How many employees completed their required training?
What is the on-time completion percentage?

metrics.question: What is the average learning progress for a course type?
metrics.description: Average progress percentage for a specific course type
related_questions: What is the average progress for this type of course?
How far along are employees in this course type?
What is the mean learning progress?
What is the average completion percentage for this course type?

metrics.question: How many certifications are expiring soon?
metrics.description: Count of certifications expiring within a specified number of days
related_questions: How many certifications will expire in the next X days?
What certifications are about to expire?
How many employees have expiring certifications?
What is the count of certifications expiring soon?

metrics.question: How many employees are missing required training?
metrics.description: Count of employees missing required training or certifications
related_questions: How many employees have compliance gaps?
What is the count of employees missing mandatory training?
How many users are non-compliant?
What is the number of employees with training gaps?

identity_and_scoping.name: identity_and_scoping
identity_and_scoping.description: Canonical identity, join keys, and scoping dimensions to support slicing by OU/department/location/role/course/training.

features.name: csod_user_id
features.description: Unique Cornerstone user identifier for the employee.
features.question: What is the unique user ID for this employee in Cornerstone?
features.purpose: Primary join key for employee-level compliance and assignment records.

features.name: csod_training_assignment_id
features.description: Unique identifier for an assignment/registration/transcript row.
features.question: What is the training assignment or registration ID for this record?
features.purpose: Primary grain key for row-level compliance tracking.

features.name: csod_course_id
features.description: Identifier of the learning object (course, curriculum item, event, etc.).
features.question: What is the course or learning object ID for this training?
features.purpose: Supports per-course compliance views and joins to course metadata.

features.name: employee_department_ou
features.description: Department organizational unit value for the employee at the time of the record (or most recent known).
features.question: What department does this employee belong to?
features.purpose: Enables slicing counts/rates by department in gold cubes.

features.name: employee_location_ou
features.description: Location organizational unit value for the employee at the time of the record (or most recent known).
features.question: What location or office does this employee work at?
features.purpose: Enables location-based compliance reporting in gold cubes.

features.name: employee_role
features.description: Employee role (job family / role label) used for role-based compliance slicing.
features.question: What is the job role or job family for this employee?
features.purpose: Role-based compliance analysis and drill-downs.

features.name: employee_position_ou
features.description: Position OU (or equivalent) for employee segmentation.
features.question: What position organizational unit is this employee assigned to?
features.purpose: Supports slicing employee-level metrics by position OU.

status_and_deadlines.name: status_and_deadlines
status_and_deadlines.description: Completion status, due dates, overdue flags, and time-to-deadline features for compliance questions.

features.name: training_status_raw
features.description: Raw status code from Cornerstone (e.g., Registered/InProgress/Completed/Exempt/Failed/Withdrawn).
features.question: What is the current status of this training assignment?
features.purpose: Base status for normalization and downstream compliance logic.

features.name: is_completed
features.description: True if the training status indicates completion.
features.question: Has the employee completed this training?
features.purpose: Core flag to compute completion counts and rates.

features.name: is_in_progress
features.description: True if the training is started but not completed.
features.question: Is the employee currently working on this training?
features.purpose: Supports progress dashboards and engagement diagnostics.

features.name: is_not_started
features.description: True if the training is assigned/registered but has not been started.
features.question: Has the employee not yet started this assigned training?
features.purpose: Supports backlog and outreach workflows (without labeling as risk).

features.name: assignment_date
features.description: Date the training was assigned (or registered).
features.question: When was this training assigned to the employee?
features.purpose: Used to compute lead time and time-in-state.

features.name: due_date
features.description: Training due date / deadline date.
features.question: When is this training due to be completed?
features.purpose: Anchor for overdue calculations and forecast windows.

features.name: completed_date
features.description: Date the training was completed (null if not completed).
features.question: When did the employee complete this training?
features.purpose: Compute completion timing and on-time completion.

features.name: days_until_due
features.description: Number of days from 'as_of_date' to due_date (negative if past due).
features.question: How many days until this training is due?
features.purpose: Supports deadline proximity analysis and forecasting windows.

features.name: is_overdue
features.description: True when due_date is in the past AND is_completed is false.
features.question: Is this training past its due date and not yet completed?
features.purpose: Core overdue flag for compliance gap and overdue-by-department metrics.

features.name: days_overdue
features.description: If overdue, number of days past due_date; else 0 (or null-safe 0).
features.question: How many days overdue is this training?
features.purpose: Supports severity banding and backlog aging analyses.

features.name: completed_on_time
features.description: True when completed_date is on/before due_date (and is_completed is true).
features.question: Was this training completed on or before the due date?
features.purpose: Core flag to compute on-time completion rates.

features.name: completion_latency_days
features.description: Days between assignment_date and completed_date (null if not completed).
features.question: How many days did it take to complete this training from assignment?
features.purpose: Operational insight into time-to-complete for courses and cohorts.

features.name: overdue_bucket
features.description: Bucketed overdue age label (e.g., NotOverdue, 1-7d, 8-30d, 31-60d, 61d+).
features.question: What overdue severity category does this training fall into?
features.purpose: Drives dashboard distribution views without aggregation at the feature layer.

progress_and_engagement.name: progress_and_engagement
progress_and_engagement.description: Progress %, last activity, and engagement freshness signals useful for explaining completion outcomes.

features.name: progress_percent
features.description: Current training progress percentage (0–100).
features.question: What percentage of the training has the employee completed?
features.purpose: Supports average learning progress and completion trajectory analysis.

features.name: last_activity_ts
features.description: Most recent learner activity timestamp for this training (launch, attempt, content interaction).
features.question: When was the employee's last activity on this training?
features.purpose: Detects stale engagement and supports operational outreach workflows.

features.name: days_since_last_activity
features.description: Days since last_activity_ts (null-safe).
features.question: How many days since the employee last accessed this training?
features.purpose: Engagement freshness signal for course completion behavior analysis.

features.name: engagement_stale_flag
features.description: True if days_since_last_activity exceeds a configurable policy threshold.
features.question: Has the employee been inactive on this training for too long?
features.purpose: Simple operational flag to group records for outreach prioritization (not a risk score).

features.name: progress_velocity_pct_per_day
features.description: Estimated progress change rate per day over a recent window (requires history; null if unavailable).
features.question: What is the employee's daily progress rate on this training?
features.purpose: Supports analysis of whether progress pace is sufficient relative to the deadline.

features.name: progress_vs_time_to_due_ratio
features.description: Heuristic ratio comparing progress_percent to remaining time window (days_until_due).
features.question: Is the employee's progress sufficient relative to the remaining time until due date?
features.purpose: Explains completion feasibility patterns without producing a risk score.

course_and_training_attributes.name: course_and_training_attributes
course_and_training_attributes.description: Course metadata features used to segment compliance outcomes (type, modality, duration, requiredness).

features.name: course_title
features.description: Course/learning object title.
features.question: What is the name or title of this course?
features.purpose: Human-readable drilldowns and dashboard labels.

features.name: course_type
features.description: Normalized course type (e.g., curriculum, online, event, certification, assessment).
features.question: What type of training is this (online, event, curriculum, etc.)?
features.purpose: Supports segmentation of compliance behavior by training modality/type.

features.name: is_mandatory_training
features.description: True if the training is flagged mandatory/required by policy or assignment rules.
features.question: Is this training mandatory or required for compliance?
features.purpose: Separates required compliance items from optional learning.

features.name: estimated_duration_minutes
features.description: Estimated course duration in minutes (null-safe).
features.question: How long is this training expected to take in minutes?
features.purpose: Explains completion latency and engagement patterns.

time_dimensions.name: time_dimensions
time_dimensions.description: Derived time keys and calendar attributes to support historic and forecast views (quarter/year) in gold cubes.

features.name: due_year
features.description: Calendar year extracted from due_date.
features.question: What year is this training due?
features.purpose: Enables year slicing for historic/forecast compliance.

features.name: due_quarter
features.description: Quarter extracted from due_date (Q1–Q4).
features.question: What quarter is this training due (Q1, Q2, Q3, or Q4)?
features.purpose: Enables quarterly trend views.

features.name: completed_year
features.description: Calendar year extracted from completed_date.
features.question: What year was this training completed?
features.purpose: Historic completion trend grouping.

features.name: completed_quarter
features.description: Quarter extracted from completed_date (Q1–Q4).
features.question: What quarter was this training completed (Q1, Q2, Q3, or Q4)?
features.purpose: Historic completion trend grouping.

certification_expiry.name: certification_expiry
certification_expiry.description: Certification status and expiry features for expiring certifications dashboards.

features.name: certification_id
features.description: Identifier for the certification record tied to the employee.
features.question: What is the certification ID for this employee's certification?
features.purpose: Join key for certification-level slicing and drilldowns.

features.name: certification_expiration_date
features.description: Date the certification expires (if applicable).
features.question: When does this certification expire?
features.purpose: Anchor for expiration proximity calculations.

features.name: days_until_certification_expiry
features.description: Days from 'as_of_date' until certification_expiration_date (negative if already expired).
features.question: How many days until this certification expires?
features.purpose: Supports expiring-soon counts with configurable thresholds in gold cubes.

features.name: is_certification_expiring_soon
features.description: True if days_until_certification_expiry is within a configurable threshold (e.g., <= 30/60/90 days).
features.question: Is this certification expiring within the policy threshold (30/60/90 days)?
features.purpose: Simple operational flag for expiry dashboards (not a risk score).

features.name: is_certification_expired
features.description: True if certification_expiration_date is in the past.
features.question: Has this certification already expired?
features.purpose: Supports compliance gap identification for expired credentials.

ml_predictions.name: ml_predictions
ml_predictions.description: Optional model-based outputs used by forecast and predictive-factor dashboards. Explicitly labeled as ML outputs.

features.name: predicted_completion_probability_by_due_date
features.displayName: Predicted Completion Probability by Due Date
features.description: Model-estimated probability that the assignment will be completed on/before due_date.
features.question: What is the predicted probability that this employee will complete the training by the due date?
features.purpose: Supports forecasting and prioritization workflows; do not treat as ground truth.

features.name: predicted_days_to_completion
features.description: Model-estimated number of days until completion (capped / null-safe).
features.question: How many days is this training predicted to take until completion?
features.purpose: Supports operational planning and forecast scenario modeling.
